heading: Security for direct or insured rural housing loans to farmer applicants
label: 1474a Security for direct or insured rural housing loans to farmer applicants
text: On and after , farmer applicants for direct or insured rural housing loans shall be required to provide only such collateral security as is required of owners of nonfarm tracts.August 8, 1968
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of Agriculture and Related Agencies Appropriation Act, 1969, and not as part of the Housing Act of 1949 which comprises this chapter.
